treatment_information.treatment_response: The mother recovered soon by fluid therapy.
The sister began to regain consciousness and became alert after plasma exchange.
The sister returned to full consciousness on the second hospital day.

treatment_timeline.event: Family members became sick 30 minutes after eating reheated fried rice.
1-year-old brother began to vomit and became lethargic.
1-year-old brother became unconscious 6 hours after eating the meal.
1-year-old brother died after 30 minutes of intensive resuscitation.
2-year-old sister and mother were brought to the hospital 6 hours after eating the food.
2-year-old sister received intravenous fluid administration, glucose and bicarbonate substitutions, and gastric lavage.
2-year-old sister began to open her eyes spontaneously but suffered from impaired consciousness.
2-year-old sister underwent plasma exchange and subsequent hemodialysis.
2-year-old sister returned to full consciousness on the second hospital day.
2-year-old sister was discharged 1 week after hospitalization.
Mother recovered soon by fluid therapy.

patient_outcome.final_status: 1-year-old brother deceased; 2-year-old sister fully recovered with no sequelae; mother fully recovered.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: 2-year-old sister was doing well with no sequelae 13 months after discharge.
patient_outcome.complications: 1-year-old brother had severe hyperkalemia, hypoglycemia, mixed acidosis, hyperlactacidemia, and elevation of liver enzymes. 2-year-old sister had severe hypoglycemia, metabolic and lactic acidosis, hyperammonemia, and transient disturbance of mitochondrial fatty acid β-oxidation.
patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: 2-year-old sister returned to full consciousness on the second hospital day and was discharged 1 week after hospitalization.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: 2-year-old sister was doing well with no sequelae 13 months after discharge.
